content:
Lati ṣe atunṣe Hall coefficient ti awọn asopọ atẹle ọkan ni hypothermia (33°C) lati 37°C, lo ilana yii:

1. Ṣe atunṣe Hall coefficient (H) nipa lilo ofin iwọn otutu ti o da lori idena asopọ, nitori idena (R) yipada pẹlu iwọn otutu (T) gẹgẹ bi:  
   \[
   R_T = R_{37} \times [1 + \alpha (T - 37)]
   \]  
   nibi \(\alpha\) jẹ ifosiwewe iwọn otutu ti ohun elo asopọ (fun irin, \(\alpha \approx 0.0039 / °C\)).

2. Nítorí náà, Hall coefficient ni 33°C jẹ:  
   \[
   H_{33} = H_{37} \times \frac{R_{
